identity.name: AestheticaMD
identity.description: A high-end, trustworthy, and precise patient management system for facial plastic surgery. Balances medical functionality with aesthetic elegance.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and card titles. Avoid using 'Bold' (700) excessively; prefer 'Semibold' (600) for a modern look.

body.usage: Use for all standard text, labels, and inputs. Prioritize readability.

mono.usage: Use for medical record numbers (MRN), dates, and precise data values.

global.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

patient_detail.left_panel: w-full md:w-1/3 border-r bg-white h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-y-auto sticky top-16

cards.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center

buttons.primary: bg-primary-700 hover:bg-primary-800 text-white shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 transition-colors

login_background.alt: Clean medical clinic interior with sink and white aesthetics
login_background.usage: Login page background, subtle overlay opacity

design_philosophy: No Gradients: Use solid colors and subtle borders.
No Shadows: Use borders to define edges (1px border-slate-200), except for floating elements.
Typography: Use standard font weights (400/500/600). Avoid 300 or 900.
Radius: Use 'rounded-xl' for containers, 'rounded-lg' for internal elements.
interaction: Hover States: Every clickable element must have a hover state (bg change or border color change).
Transitions: 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' on interactive elements.
Feedback: Use Sonner toasts for all actions (Save, Delete, Update).
accessibility: Contrast: Ensure text is Slate-900 on white, or White on Primary-700.
Focus: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary-500) for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: For the 'Before/After' comparison, if a library like 'react-compare-slider' is not available, build a simple custom component using a range input overlaid on two absolute positioned images.
Use the provided image URLs for seeding the database or displaying mock data.
Ensure the 'Patient Detail' page is the masterpiece: Split screen, sticky left sidebar for info, scrollable right side for the photo grid.
